zh.lifeSummary: Mary Collier於1512年2月18日出生在英國素瑞素瓦可。她於1529年與Thomas Prince Sr.在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1562年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Collier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English colier, in most parts of the country ‘maker or seller of charcoal’, but in some areas (such as Bolton le Moors and Wigan, Lancashire) where coal measures were near the surface, ‘miner or seller of coal’ (in the modern sense, ‘fossil fuel’). The name was taken to Ireland from England and was first recorded there in 1305. In Petty's ‘census’ of 1659, it was recorded as a principal surname in Meath.
English: occupational name from Middle English coilour, coliour, culliour, Old French coileor, coillour ‘tax collector’. Surnames with this origin seem to have died out in Britain.
French (northern): from collier ‘collar’, a metonymic occupational name for a maker of collars.

variants.name: Callier
meanings: French: from an Old French term denoting earthenware and, by extension, a particular type of earthenware vessel from which new wine was drunk, hence probably a metonymic occupational name for a maker of such crocks.
French: from caielier, an occupational name for a chair maker, from an agent derivative of caiel ‘chair’.

English (Staffordshire): probably a variant of the occupational name Collier ‘charcoal burner’, though in some cases perhaps a variant of Caller, from a Middle English side-form callier with substitution of the suffix -ier for -er. In Kent and Somerset, Caller is chiefly a variant of the nickname or habitational name Callow . Elsewhere it may derive either from Middle English caller ‘maker of cauls’ (baskets, nets, women's close-fitting caps or headdresses for covering tied up hair), from Middle English calle ‘basket, net’ (Old English cawl), or from a topographic or occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a sheep pen or pigsty (Middle English calle), synonymous with atte Calle. See Call .

variants.name: Coller
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German and German   Koller   or   Kohler  .

variants.name: Collar
meanings: Spanish: from collar ‘collar’. This name is found especially in Asturias and Extremadura.
Americanized form of German   Koller   or   Kohler  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Collier was born on 18 February 1512, in Southwark, Surrey, England. She married Thomas Prince Sr. in 1529, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1562, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 50.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Collierは1512年2月18日にイギリススリーソウスワークで生まれた。1529年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォードでThomas Prince Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1562年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで50歳で死去した。

ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Collier(은)는 1512년 2월 18일 영국 수리 소우스워크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 Thomas Prince Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Collier родилась 18 февраля 1512 г. в местности соутварк, сурри, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Prince Sr. в 1529 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1562 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 50 лет.
